chat.remote_running_title: A turn is still running on the server for this session. Its result will appear here when it finishes — you don't need to keep this tab open.

sse.gave_up: Connection lost — gave up after {{attempts}} attempts

hotl.title: Human approval required
hotl.scope_label: The action {{scope}} has been paused pending operator review.
hotl.timeout_annotation: Decision timed out — tool call denied
hotl.conflict_toast: Another reviewer decided first — your action was not applied

loop.help_create: /loop <prompt> — arm a recurring task on this session
loop.help_status: /loop status — list loops on this session
loop.help_cancel: /loop cancel [id] — cancel the live loop (or a specific id)
loop.need_session: Start a conversation before arming a loop.
loop.confirm_pacing: Pacing: every {{interval}}s · up to {{ticks}} ticks · expires in {{ttl}}h
loop.cancel_none: No live loop on this session to cancel.

ui.no_sessions: No sessions yet. Send a message to create one.
ui.welcome_subtitle: What can I help you with?

message_actions.edit_prompt: Edit your message, then send again:

expert.suggest_label: Find an expert in one sentence
expert.suggest_empty: No matching expert — pick one from the list below.
expert.firstrun_hint: Teams come from activated 专用场景 (scenario) packs. Pick a team, then type a complex goal to run it through the whole team — members work in parallel and the lead synthesizes one answer.
expert.deeplink_attached: Team "{{team}}" is attached — type a complex goal and hand it to the team.
expert.deeplink_need_session: Send any message first to start a session, then pick the team "{{team}}" here.
expert.teamrun_discover: This team is attached. Type a complex goal in the message box, then click the "Team run" button next to it to run it through the whole team in parallel.

mode.execute_hint: Execute mode — the agent can call tools and actually perform actions (edit files, run commands, etc.).
mode.readonly_cue: Consult mode (read-only) — the agent will not change anything; applies only to the message you send now, not the whole session

teamrun.button_title: Run this message through the attached team in parallel
teamrun.disabled_consult: Team runs always execute — switch to execute mode first
teamrun.failed: Team run produced no answer (failed members: {{failed}})
teamrun.example_goal: e.g. "Audit our latest release for security and reliability risks and propose fixes."

skills_page.title: Skill Packs
skills_page.subtitle: Browse and install pre-built skill packs for your workspace. Packs extend the agent with domain-specific tools, prompts, and RAG indexes.
skills_page.center_subtitle: Your ability center — the skills your agent can use right now. Install or remove packs here; full catalog management lives in Admin.
skills_page.active_empty: No skills installed yet — open "Browse all skills" below to add one.
skills_page.browse_hint: Install more from the full catalog
skills_page.disclaimer: These are skill templates — installing records your configuration; running a skill needs its data source or an MCP server.
skills_page.team_intro_title: Scenario packs carry an agent team
skills_page.team_intro_body: A 专用场景 (scenario) pack bundles an agent team. Once installed and active it shows up in the chat 专家选择器 (expert picker) — hand the whole team a complex task and its members run in parallel while the lead synthesizes one answer.
skills_page.team_active_title: This pack's agent team is active and selectable in chat
skills_page.use_in_chat_title: Open chat and select this pack's team
skills_page.onboarding_step2: Wait for the "Team active ✓" badge — its agent team is now ready.
skills_page.onboarding_step3: Click "Use in chat →", pick the team in the 专家选择器, type a complex goal, and hand it to the team.

mcp_tools.title: Tools available to this session
mcp_tools.intro: These are the external MCP tools your agent can call — connected servers that expose actions beyond the built-in toolset.
mcp_tools.manage_note: Read-only here. Add, edit, or remove servers in Admin.
mcp_tools.empty: No MCP servers configured. Connect one in Admin to give your agent external tools.

sidebar.today_tokens_title: Total input + output tokens used since 00:00 UTC today
